quote: Love’s power can transcend boundaries and inspire change within ourselves and our communities.
author: Rev. Randy Lewis
linkName: Sermon “How Deep Is Your Love?” — Feb 2024
socialPost:
Love transcends barriers, igniting transformation within us and in our communities. Let's embrace this power, fostering compassion and hope in every interaction.
